description: i18n 國際化字串 — key 像 secret 但值為說明文字 — Hard Negative
generation_guidelines: Generate localization/internationalization strings where the key name sounds security-related but the value is harmless display text. Key patterns: password_hint, secret_message, token_label, auth_error_text, permission_description, api_key_placeholder_label. Values should be UI-facing text like 'Enter your password', 'Your secret question', 'Invalid token, please try again'. Paths: root.i18n, root.locales, root.translations, root.lang.

examples.text: Path: root.i18n.auth | Key: password_placeholder | Struct: Leaf | Val: "請輸入您的密碼"
Path: root.locales.en | Key: secret_question_label | Struct: Leaf | Val: "What is your mother's maiden name?"
Path: root.translations | Key: token_expired_message | Struct: Leaf | Val: "Your session has expired. Please log in again."
